title: BL9 9TF, United Utilities Water Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/SP3631LL/V009
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: United Utilities Water Limited Installation name: Bury Wastewater Treatment Works Sludge Treatment Facility Permit number: EPR/SP3631LL/V009  "
